name: start
description_tr: Uygulamayi baslatir; aciksa tekrar baslatmak yerine odaga alir.
description_en: Launches an app; if it is already open, focuses it instead.

name: open
description_tr: URL, dosya, klasor veya uygulama acar.
description_en: Opens a URL, file, folder, or app.
parameters: url, path, filename, or app name

name: close
description_tr: Acik uygulamayi kapatir (kapat, sonlandir, bitir, quit, exit).
description_en: Closes an open app (close, quit, exit, terminate, kapat, sonlandir, bitir).

name: volume
description_tr: Sistem ses seviyesini ayarlar, artirir veya azaltir.
description_en: Sets, raises, or lowers system volume.
parameters: number 0-100, or up/down with optional amount

name: brightness
description_tr: Ekran parlakligini ayarlar, artirir veya azaltir.
description_en: Sets, raises, or lowers screen brightness.
parameters: number 0-100, or up/down with optional amount

name: mute
description_tr: Sistemi sessize alir veya sesi geri acar (toggle).
description_en: Toggles system mute (mute/unmute/sessize al).

name: focus
description_tr: Acik uygulamayi one getirir.
description_en: Brings an open app to the foreground.

name: browser_open
description_tr: Normal tarayicida URL acar; Playwright kullanmaz.
description_en: Opens a URL in a normal browser; does not use Playwright.

name: browser_search
description_tr: Normal tarayicida arama yapar; Playwright kullanmaz.
description_en: Runs a search in a normal browser; does not use Playwright.

name: web_open
description_tr: Playwright tarayicisinda URL acar.
description_en: Opens a URL in the Playwright browser.

name: web_search
description_tr: Playwright ile web aramasi yapar.
description_en: Runs a web search with Playwright.

name: youtube_search
description_tr: YouTube'da ilk reklamsiz uzun sonucu acmaya calisir.
description_en: Tries to open the first non-ad long YouTube result.

name: web_click
description_tr: Playwright DOM-first locator ile tiklar.
description_en: Clicks using Playwright DOM-first locators.

name: web_type
description_tr: Playwright ile alana yazi yazar.
description_en: Types into a field with Playwright.

name: web_form_fill
description_tr: Form/giris doldurur (Playwright veya normal tarayici UIA). mode=login; email=...; password=...; submit=true
description_en: Fills forms/login (Playwright or native browser UIA). mode=login; email=...; password=...; submit=true

name: gui_click_text
description_tr: Once UIA ile, olmazsa OCR/VLM destekli gorunen metne tiklar.
description_en: Clicks visible text using UIA first, then OCR/VLM fallback.

name: gui_wait_text
description_tr: Once UIA ile, olmazsa OCR ile metnin gorunmesini bekler.
description_en: Waits for visible text using UIA first, then OCR fallback.

name: gui_map
description_tr: Debug icin ekran haritasi kaydeder.
description_en: Saves a GUI map for debugging.

name: type
description_tr: Aktif alana klavyeden yazi yazar.
description_en: Types text into the active field.

name: hotkey
description_tr: Klavye kisayolu basar.
description_en: Presses a keyboard shortcut.

name: write_file
description_tr: Dosya olusturur veya tam kaynak kodu yazar. Oyun/HTML/Python projeleri icin TAM icerik zorunlu.
description_en: Creates/writes a file with FULL source content. Required for games, HTML, Python, and scripts.

name: run_code
description_tr: Kod dosyasini kullanici onayi ile calistirir.
description_en: Runs a code file after user confirmation.

name: routine_create
description_tr: Hafizaya rutin kaydeder.
description_en: Stores a routine in memory.
examples: ders -> discord ac ve spotify ac

name: routine_run
description_tr: Kayitli rutini calistirir.
description_en: Runs a stored routine.

name: routine_list
description_tr: Kayitli rutinleri listeler.
description_en: Lists stored routines.

name: routine_delete
description_tr: Kayitli rutini siler.
description_en: Deletes a stored routine.

name: delete
description_tr: Dosya/klasoru cop kutusuna gonderir.
description_en: Sends a file/folder to trash.

name: cmd
description_tr: Komut satiri komutu calistirir; son care ve onay ister.
description_en: Runs a command prompt command; last resort and requires confirmation.

name: powershell
description_tr: PowerShell komutu calistirir; son care ve onay ister.
description_en: Runs a PowerShell command; last resort and requires confirmation.

name: shutdown
description_tr: Bilgisayari kapatir; onay ister.
description_en: Shuts down the PC; requires confirmation.

name: restart
description_tr: Bilgisayari yeniden baslatir; onay ister.
description_en: Restarts the PC; requires confirmation.

name: sleep
description_tr: Bilgisayari uyku moduna alir; onay ister.
description_en: Puts the PC into sleep mode; requires confirmation.

name: reminder
description_tr: Belirtilen zamanda bildirim gosteren bir hatirlatici kurar (Windows gorev zamanlayici).
description_en: Sets a reminder that shows a notification at the given time (Windows Task Scheduler).
parameters: time -> message (e.g. '2026-06-22 09:00 -> toplanti', '18:30 -> ilac', '+10m -> mola', '5 dakika sonra -> ara')

name: youtube_summarize
description_tr: Bir YouTube videosunun transkriptini cekip LLM ile ozetler. URL, video id veya arama sorgusu kabul eder.
description_en: Fetches a YouTube video transcript and summarises it with the LLM. Accepts a URL, video id, or search query.
parameters: youtube url, video id, or search query

name: file_process
description_tr: Bir dosyayi uzantisina gore isler: ozetler, metin cikarir, bilgi verir, gorseli aciklar veya OCR yapar.
description_en: Processes a file by extension: summarise, extract text, info, describe image, or OCR.
parameters: path -> action (action one of: summarize | extract_text | info | describe | ocr)

name: dev_project
description_tr: Cok dosyali bir proje/uygulama uretir: planlar, dosyalari yazar, bagimliliklari kurar, calistirir ve hatalari otomatik duzeltir. Tek dosyalik basit isler icin write_file kullan; bu yalnizca cok dosyali projeler icindir.
description_en: Builds a multi-file project/app: plans, writes files, installs deps, runs it, and auto-fixes errors. Use write_file for simple single-file tasks; this is only for multi-file projects.
